title: Xenial Yeasty Moroccan Lamb Bissara
description: A traditional Moroccan bissara dish with a yeasty twist, featuring lamb and passion fruit pulp, cooked in a fondue pot. This halal-friendly recipe is perfect for a romantic dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the fondue pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the cumin, coriander, and yeast, and stir to combine.
Add the passion fruit pulp and chicken broth, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the bissara hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Cook poultry to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F before serving.
